afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.details: Deposits swap output to vault as new commitment

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.details: Verifies ZK proof, marks nullifier spent, validates pool authorization

executePrivateSwap((address,address,uint.details: Solver provides ZK proof on behalf of user, pays gas, earns fee

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: Called by PoolManager after swap execution

authorizePool((address,address,uint24,in.notice: Authorize a pool for private swaps. Only owner can call.

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: Called by PoolManager before swap execution

deauthorizePool((address,address,uint24,.notice: Revoke pool authorization. Only owner can call.

executePrivateSwap((address,address,uint.notice: Entry point for solvers to execute private swaps

getHookPermissions().notice: Returns the hook's permissions bitmap for Uniswap v4

pause().notice: Emergency pause all swaps. Guardian or owner can call.

setGuardian(address).notice: Set the guardian address (3-of-5 multisig). Only owner can call.

unpause().notice: Unpause swaps. Only owner can call (requires higher authority).
